flags.label: Public bachelor's-predominant peer
flags.summary: 10-year earnings at Lincoln University are 22% below the public bachelor's-predominant peer median ($43.2k vs $55.2k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Lincoln University rose 13% between 2006 and 2009 ($11.5k → $13.0k).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Lincoln University fell 13% between 2021 and 2024 (1.8k → 1.5k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Lincoln University fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (6.5% → 0.0%).
